story-agent.comment: OpenRouter crew over stdio — run_crew_mission_pipeline, crew memory recall/store, Aha, WorfGate, skills. The wrapper sources crew secrets. Lets Claude Code call the crew directly instead of tsx mission scripts. See docs/setup/claude-code-mcp.md.

figma.comment: Official Figma MCP — LOCAL desktop server (loopback only, no external egress). Crew-selected + crew-approved (evaluate_tool_for_crew: figma-mcp-local — 3 approvals, qualityScore 1.00). The REMOTE server (https://mcp.figma.com/mcp) was Worf-vetoed for external-egress / controlled-data leakage. Read-only design→code context feeding the crew's Figma→LCARS scaffold pipeline. REQUIRES the Figma desktop app running with Dev Mode MCP enabled (Figma → Preferences → Enable Dev Mode MCP Server). Scope: non-controlled UI frames only, never sa_*/client data. See docs/design/figma-pipeline.md.

figma-context.comment: GLips Figma-Context-MCP (io.github.GLips/Figma-Context-MCP) — stdio-local, crew-approved (evaluate_tool_for_crew: figma-context-mcp-glips — 3 approvals, qualityScore 1.00, adopt-first per RAG 139). Feeds richer Figma layout data (nodes/constraints/typography/spacing) to geordi's LCARS scaffold pipeline. Auth = a READ-ONLY Figma personal access token (File content: Read) via FIGMA_API_KEY, governed by the WorfGate registry (op figma:read), centralized in ~/.alexai-secrets (NOT ~/.zshrc — the non-interactive crew lane must resolve it), never committed; egress = Figma API only. Set FIGMA_API_KEY, then reconnect (/mcp) to activate. See docs/setup/mcp-candidates-ui-management.md + docs/runbooks/worfgate-break-glass.md.

shadcn-ui.comment: TRIAL: jpisnice/shadcn-ui-mcp-server (npm: @jpisnice/shadcn-ui-mcp-server) approved by Observation Lounge UI pivot slate. WorfGate posture: stdio-local only, no remote OAuth/elevated egress, non-controlled UI assets only. Purpose: optional component reference/scaffolding support when a client adopts shadcn patterns alongside LCARS.

dashboards.comment: TRIAL: io.github.KyuRish/mcp-dashboards (npm: mcp-dashboards) approved by Observation Lounge UI pivot slate. WorfGate posture: stdio-local only; no controlled-data export; use for dashboard chart/KPI scaffolding and exploration in non-regulated contexts.
